children.name: RegisterPatient
children.purpose: Validate required fields, create patient record, and generate unique patient_id
children.behavior: Check that name, dob, contact, and insurance are present in patient_data; if missing, return error. Generate a unique patient_id (e.g., UUID). Store patient record in patients database with registered_at timestamp. Return success with patient_id.
postconditions: patient record exists in patients database

inputs.name: patient_data
inputs.description: Patient payload with name, dob, contact, insurance

outputs.name: patient_result
outputs.description: Result dict with success (bool), data (dict with patient_id), message (str)

children.name: BookAppointment
children.purpose: Check patient exists, check doctor availability, create appointment record, send confirmation
children.behavior: Verify patient_id exists in patients database. Check that appointment_time is not in the past. Query appointments database for doctor_id at requested time to ensure no conflict. If available, create appointment record with status 'confirmed' and generate appointment_id. Return success with appointment details.
postconditions: appointment record created in appointments database

inputs.name: patient_data
inputs.description: Patient payload with patient_id, doctor_id, appointment_time

outputs.name: patient_result
outputs.description: Result dict with success (bool), data (dict with appointment_id, details), message (str)

children.name: RetrieveMedicalRecords
children.purpose: Retrieve all medical records for a patient, sorted by date descending
children.behavior: Query records database for all records matching patient_id. Sort by timestamp descending. Return list of records.

outputs.name: patient_result
outputs.description: Result dict with success (bool), data (list of records), message (str)

children.name: UpdatePatientProfile
children.purpose: Update patient profile fields, validate insurance change against external system
children.behavior: Check patient_id exists. Update allowed fields (name, dob, contact) in patients database. If insurance field is present and changed, validate against external system (simulated check). If validation fails, return error. Otherwise, update insurance. Return success with updated profile.

inputs.name: patient_data
inputs.description: Patient payload with patient_id and fields to update

outputs.name: patient_result
outputs.description: Result dict with success (bool), data (dict with updated fields), message (str)

parent_inputs_covered_by.command: routed to children via conditional logic
parent_inputs_covered_by.patient_data: passed to each child as input

parent_outputs_produced_by.patient_result: produced by each child and returned to parent
